Package org.bukkit

Class MusicInstrument

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.MusicInstrument
All Implemented Interfaces:
Keyed, RegistryAware
public abstract class MusicInstrument extends Object implements Keyed, RegistryAware

    • getDuration

      public abstract float getDuration()
      Gets how long the use duration is for the instrument.
      Returns:
      the duration.

    • getRange

      public abstract float getRange()
      Gets the range of the sound.
      Returns:
      the range of the sound.

    • getDescription

      @NotNull public abstract String getDescription()
      Gets the description of this instrument.
      Returns:
      the description.

    • getSoundEvent

      @NotNull public abstract Sound getSoundEvent()
      Gets the sound/sound-event for this instrument.
      Returns:
      a sound.

    • getKey

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.4") public abstract NamespacedKey getKey()
      Deprecated.
      A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.
      Return the namespaced identifier for this object.
      Specified by:
      getKey in interface Keyed
      Returns:
      this object's key
      See Also:
      • RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow()
      • RegistryAware.isRegistered()

    • getByKey

      @Nullable @Deprecated(since="1.20.1") public static MusicInstrument getByKey(@NotNull NamespacedKey namespacedKey)
      Deprecated.
      Use Registry.get(NamespacedKey) instead.
      Returns a MusicInstrument by a NamespacedKey.
      Parameters:
      namespacedKey - the key
      Returns:
      the event or null

    • values

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.20.1") public static Collection<MusicInstrument> values()
      Deprecated.
      use Iterable.iterator().
      Returns all known MusicInstruments.
      Returns:
      the memoryKeys
